seo.meta_description: Loop Marketing for ecommerce brands. Replace the funnel with a continuous cycle: Express, Tailor, Amplify, Evolve. Full revenue attribution included. No HubSpot required to start.
seo.og_description: Content Cucumber implements Loop Marketing for ecommerce brands. 40+ human writers, full attribution, and a methodology built for how buyers buy today. We set up the platform for you.

form.header: Get Your Free Loop Marketing Review
form.trust_text: HubSpot Solutions Partner. Loop Marketing certified. 30+ years in ecommerce.

data.title:
The funnel is dead.
The loop is how you grow now.
paragraphs: Your buyers research on Reddit, YouTube, and ChatGPT before they ever visit your site. They expect personalized messaging, not generic campaigns. And by the time you see quarterly reports, the opportunity is gone. Loop Marketing solves this with a continuous cycle: Express your brand voice with authenticity, Tailor messaging using AI and CRM data, Amplify across every channel your buyers actually use, and Evolve by iterating in real time instead of waiting for the next quarter.
Your free Loop Marketing review includes:

• Scorecard mapping your marketing to the four loop stages
  • Express score: how differentiated is your content?
  • Tailor score: where is personalization missing?
  • Amplify score: how well are you distributing across channels?
  • Evolve score: are you optimizing based on what works?
  • Prioritized list of fixes ranked by revenue impact
  • 30-minute call with an ecommerce marketing expert
  • Written deliverable you can act on immediately

data.title: Why the Funnel Stopped Working
data.subtitle: These are the four problems Loop Marketing was built to solve. If any of these sound familiar, your marketing needs a new framework.

items.title: AI Content Flooded the Market
items.text: Every brand is publishing the same AI-generated content. Blog posts, product descriptions, social captions. It all sounds identical. When everyone has the same content, nobody stands out. The Express stage of Loop Marketing starts with content that differentiates your brand.

items.title: Your Attribution Is Broken
items.text: AI search is changing how traffic gets tracked. Your organic numbers look lower, but your revenue might be stable. The old attribution models can't account for zero-click results, AI overviews, and multi-touch buyer journeys. You need a system that tracks the full loop, not just last-click.

items.title: Your Buyers Don't Follow a Funnel
items.text: The linear funnel assumed buyers move from awareness to consideration to decision in order. They don't. They jump between channels, revisit stages, and make decisions on their own terms. Loop Marketing is built for this reality. It meets buyers wherever they are in the cycle.

items.title: Your Marketing Services Are Commoditized
items.text: When every agency offers the same blog-and-SEO package, you're buying a commodity. Loop Marketing is a methodology, not a menu of deliverables. It connects content creation, personalization, amplification, and optimization into one continuous system tied to revenue.

data.title:
From linear funnel
to continuous loop.
paragraphs: The marketing funnel was built for a world where you controlled the buyer journey. That world is gone. Buyers move between channels, skip stages, and make decisions on their own timeline.

HubSpot's Loop Marketing framework (launched at Inbound 2025) replaces the funnel with four continuous stages: Express (create differentiated content), Tailor (personalize for context), Amplify (distribute across channels), and Evolve (optimize based on what's working).
We implement the full loop with real attribution, so you can see how each stage drives revenue. Already on HubSpot? Great. Not yet? We set it up as part of the engagement.

old_way.heading: Linear Funnel
items: Publish and pray for Google traffic
Traffic metrics with no revenue tie

data.title: Is Loop Marketing Right for You?
data.subtitle: Loop Marketing isn't for everyone. It's for ecommerce brands that are done with the content hamster wheel and ready for a system that compounds.

fits.text: You're an ecommerce brand doing $1M+ in revenue
You want a marketing platform that ties content to revenue (we set up HubSpot for you if you don't have it)
You've tried content marketing but can't tie it to revenue
You want to show up in AI search (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity), not just Google
You need a team, not another tool

not_fits.text: You just need a freelance writer for a few blog posts
You're looking for the cheapest content option
You don't have a product-market fit yet

data.title: What the Loop Delivers
data.subtitle: Not services. Outcomes. Here's what ecommerce brands get when they run the full loop.

items.title: Content That Stands Out (Express)
items.text: 40+ human writers create content with real ecommerce expertise. RequestDesk captures your brand voice and manages the entire content pipeline. In a market flooded with AI output, human content backed by smart tooling is the differentiator.

items.title: Revenue You Can Trace (Tailor)
items.text: Full attribution with context-driven personalization. RequestDesk connects content to your CRM so you can see which content drives which sales, for which segments. We set up HubSpot Marketing Hub Pro as the engine if you don't have it yet.

items.title: Visible Everywhere Buyers Look (Amplify)
items.text: Your products show up in ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI overviews, email, and social. We optimize for AIO (not just SEO) and distribute across every channel where your buyers spend time in 2026.

items.title: Always Getting Better (Evolve)
items.text: The loop never stops. Performance data from every stage feeds back into optimization. What's working gets amplified. What isn't gets adjusted. Your marketing compounds over time instead of resetting every quarter.

data.title: Ecommerce specialists who understand the Loop.

highlights.title: 30+ Years in Ecommerce
highlights.text: Led by Brent Peterson, Content Cucumber works with online brands. We speak at eTail, Shoptalk, and industry events. We host Talk Commerce, a podcast with 500+ episodes featuring ecommerce leaders.

highlights.title: Early Loop Adopters
highlights.text: We adopted Loop Marketing early because we've been saying the funnel is broken for years. The non-linear buyer journey isn't new to us. HubSpot just gave it a name and a framework.

highlights.title: Team + Platform
highlights.text: Content Cucumber is the team. RequestDesk is the platform. Together they run the full loop. RequestDesk handles brand voice, content execution, and publishing across channels. HubSpot provides the CRM and attribution layer. We set up everything.

items.question: "What is Loop Marketing?"
items.answer: Loop Marketing is HubSpot's framework (launched at Inbound 2025) that replaces the traditional marketing funnel with a continuous cycle. It has four stages: Express (create differentiated content), Tailor (personalize for context), Amplify (distribute across channels), and Evolve (optimize based on data). It's built for how buyers make decisions today, which is non-linear.

items.question: "Do we need HubSpot already?"
items.answer: No. Most of our clients don't have HubSpot when they start. We set up HubSpot Marketing Hub Pro as part of every Loop Marketing engagement. You get the attribution, personalization, and automation that makes each loop stage measurable. If you're already on HubSpot, we integrate with your existing setup.

items.question: "AI can write our content. Why do we need writers?"
items.answer: The Express stage of Loop Marketing is about differentiated content. AI produces the same output for every brand. When every competitor publishes identical AI content, none of it stands out. Our 40+ human writers create content with real expertise and your brand voice. That's what makes the Express stage work.

items.question: "How is this different from regular content marketing?"
items.answer: Regular content marketing is linear. Create content, publish it, hope it works. Loop Marketing is a continuous system. Content creation (Express) feeds into personalization (Tailor), which feeds into distribution (Amplify), which feeds performance data back into optimization (Evolve). Every stage makes every other stage better. And with HubSpot attribution, you can see the revenue impact at every point.

items.question: "What does the free Loop Marketing review include?"
items.answer: You get a one-page scorecard that maps your current marketing to the four loop stages and scores each one. We show you where content isn't differentiated (Express), where personalization is missing (Tailor), where distribution is limited (Amplify), and where optimization isn't happening (Evolve). You walk away with a prioritized list of what to fix first based on revenue impact. It's a 30-minute call and a written deliverable you can act on immediately.

items.question: "How does pricing work?"
items.answer: We price based on outcomes, not hours or points. Each package is scoped to a specific goal: visibility, leads, or revenue. Content volume is whatever it takes to hit the outcome. If it takes 10 blog posts one month and 20 the next, that's our problem, not yours. We'll walk you through the options on a call and recommend the right fit for your brand.

items.question: "What is RequestDesk?"
items.answer: RequestDesk is our content execution platform. It captures your brand voice, manages your content pipeline, integrates with HubSpot CRM for personalized content, and publishes across Shopify, WordPress, and social channels. Think of it as the content layer that plugs into your HubSpot. Content Cucumber is the team that runs it.

You'll get a one-page scorecard of your four loop stages, a prioritized list of gaps, and a clear next step. 30-minute call, written deliverable, no sales pitch.
